mapper.select: SELECT p.id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, IFNULL(SUM(pay.actual_amount), 0) as totalIncome, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) FROM tb_commission c JOIN tb_transaction t2 ON c.transaction_id = t2.id JOIN tb_house h2 ON t2.house_id = h2.id WHERE h2.project_id = p.id AND c.status >= 1) as totalCommission, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_transaction t3 JOIN tb_house h3 ON t3.house_id = h3.id WHERE h3.project_id = p.id AND t3.status = 4 AND t3.is_deleted = 0) as dealCount FROM tb_project p LEFT JOIN tb_house h ON p.id = h.project_id LEFT JOIN tb_transaction t ON h.id = t.house_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_payment pay ON t.id = pay.transaction_id AND pay.payment_status = 1 AND pay.flow_type = 1 GROUP BY p.id, p.project_name

SELECT u.id as userId, u.real_name, IFNULL(SUM(t.deal_price), 0) as totalDealAmount, IFNULL(SUM(t.actual_paid_amount), 0) as totalActualPaid, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(c.amount), 0) FROM tb_commission c WHERE c.sales_id = u.id AND c.status >= 1) as totalCommission, COUNT(t.id) as totalOrders FROM sys_user u JOIN tb_transaction t ON u.id = t.sales_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.real_name

SELECT dateStr, SUM(income) as income, SUM(expense) as expense FROM (
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(payment_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateStr, SUM(CASE WHEN flow_type = 1 THEN actual_amount ELSE 0 END) as income, SUM(CASE WHEN flow_type = 2 THEN actual_amount ELSE 0 END) as expense FROM tb_payment WHERE payment_status = 1 AND payment_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY dateStr
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as dateStr, 0 as income, SUM(amount) as expense FROM tb_commission WHERE status = 1 AND update_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY dateStr ) t GROUP BY dateStr ORDER BY dateStr ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.update_time, '%Y-%m') as month, IFNULL(SUM(t.deal_price), 0) as value FROM tb_transaction t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.status = 4 AND t.update_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.update_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT CASE h.house_type WHEN 1 THEN '新房' WHEN 2 THEN '二手房' WHEN 3 THEN '租房' ELSE '其他' END as name, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as value FROM tb_house h JOIN tb_transaction t ON h.id = t.house_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.status = 4 GROUP BY h.house_type
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_customer WHERE is_deleted = 0) as customerCount, 0 as viewingCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_transaction WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 4) as dealCount

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(t.deal_price), 0) as totalDealAmount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_customer WHERE is_deleted = 0) as newCustomerCount, 0 as totalViewings FROM tb_transaction t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.status = 4
